title: Pure Functions, Immutability, and Data Copies · Transformation Lens: Immutable Update
summary: Repair a pricing pipeline where aliases mutate shared orders during validation. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp immutable update increment in a pure price transformation with alias-safety tests. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Return updated immutable records while preserving unchanged data and input values.
Predict mutation through shared aliases in nested Python containers.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
